description: Look stylish in these brown leather shoes from provogue. These dressy shoes are designed for comfort and look great when teamed with pants and shirts for a formal look.Upper High quality leather upper for comfort and durability Distressed look design with tapered toe box for a very stylish look Zipper on both sides of the tongue for easy wear Stitch detailing all over the upper in definite patterns Leather lining for greater comfort Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort PU midsoles for lightweight comfort Outsole Outsole with textured wood finish for better grip Heel for ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe dust using a dry, clean clothUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyDo not store in direct sunlight
